creator: andrews@TECHNOLOGIST.COM
text:
This fixes XKOBO on -STABLE.
Someone reported this to me, but I don't have his
email anymore.. whoever it was - thanks! and sorry
I took so long to send the PR to fix it. :\

Broken by:		Alex Langer <alex@big.endian.de>
Break noticed by:	Alex Langer <alex@big.endian.de>

How-To-Repeat: 
Use the patch below to fix the current port for -STABLE.
